startPoint.en: Talk to Chief Tess in the centre of Oo'glog.
startPoint.es: Habla con Chief Tess en el centro de Oo'glog.

items.name: Teasing stick
items.display: Teasing stick (Unless you are buying the 8 larupia furs from the grand exchange)

items.name: Spears
items.display: Four spears of the same type (bone spears work; poisoned spears and leaf-bladed spears do not work)

recommended.name: Oo'glog lodestone
recommended.display: Activated the Oo'glog lodestone (Fastest method of travel)

recommended.name: Master archaeologist's outfit
recommended.display: Master archaeologist's outfit or Archaeology teleport to Chief Tess

recommended.name: South Feldip Hills Teleport
recommended.display: Runes for the South Feldip Hills Teleport (1 air rune, 1 water rune and 1 law rune)

recommended.name: Ring of duelling
recommended.display: A ring of duelling to teleport to the Warforge Dig Site, a short distance west from Oo'glog

recommended.name: Fairy ring
recommended.display: The Fairy ring AKS is north of Oo'glog

recommended.name: Spirit Tree
recommended.display: The Spirit Tree at South Feldip Hills Teleport

rewards.name: Casket
rewards.display: A mixture of 4 items, either caskets or oysters

rewards.name: Oo'glog Hunter area
rewards.display: Access to the Oo'glog Hunter area

rewards.name: Platypus
rewards.display: Access to the platypus summoning pet (requires 10 Summoning).

children.name: If you release your pet in the spot you released the others during the quest you will receive another casket or oyster
children.display: If you release your pet in the spot you released the others during the quest you will receive another casket or oyster

rewards.name: Fresh Meat
rewards.display: Access to the Fresh Meat shop

rewards.name: Oo'glog
rewards.display: Ability to travel to Oo'glog using the charter ships

rewards.name: Robust glass
rewards.display: Ability to create robust glass and crystal glass

rewards.name: Decanting
rewards.display: Access to decanting five and six dose flasks into other flasks or vials (talk to Teplin Macagan)

text.en: Head to Oo'glog and talk to Chief Tess.
text.es: Dirígete a Oo'glog y habla con Chief Tess.

chatOptions: 1 What exactly is going on around here?
Accept
1 So about this 'business venture'..
1 Can I help at all?

text.en: Talk to Balnea in the Oo'glog bank.
text.es: Habla con Balnea en el banco de Oo'glog.

chatOptions: 1 Um, yes. So, what's going on around here?
2 What's the problem?
1 Okay, I'll bite. Tell me more.
1 But of course!
1 Well, why not? I've nothing better to do.
1 Sure thing.

text.en: 10 eucalyptus logs, 8 achey tree logs, 4 spears and 2 raw chompies
text.es: 10 eucalyptus logs, 8 achey tree logs, 4 spears y 2 raw chompies

text.en: Talk to Chargurr north of the bank.
text.es: Habla con Chargurr al norte del banco.

chatOptions: 1 I think I could get that stuff for you.

text.en: Talk to Chargurr with 8 achey tree logs and 10 eucalyptus logs in the backpack to add them to the fire pit.
text.es: Habla con Chargurr con 8 achey tree logs y 10 eucalyptus logs en la mochila para añadirlos a la hoguera.

text.en: Talk to Chargurr.
text.es: Habla con Chargurr.

chatOptions: 2 Fine, I'll get some spears for you

text.en: Give her four spears.
text.es: Dale cuatro spears.

chatOptions: 2 Yes, I'd like to give 4 spears to Chargurr.

text.en: Talk to Chargurr.
text.es: Habla con Chargurr.

chatOptions: 2 But of course! I'll bring you some chompy birds.

text.en: Use two raw chompies on Chargurr.
text.es: Usa dos raw chompies en Chargurr.

text.en: Talk to Chargurr.
text.es: Habla con Chargurr.

text.en: Light the fire pit.
text.es: Enciende la hoguera.

text.en: Talk to Chargurr.
text.es: Habla con Chargurr.

text.en: 8 stripy feathers (or a bird snare)
text.es: 8 stripy feathers (o una bird snare)

text.en: Talk to Balnea located in the bank.
text.es: Habla con Balnea, que se encuentra en el banco.

chatOptions: 1 Right-ho. I'll go and see Snurgh at the hotel and 'transition' away.

text.en: Talk to Snurgh who is in the easternmost building of Oo'glog.
text.es: Habla con Snurgh, que está en el edificio más al este de Oo'glog.

chatOptions: 1 Sure, I'll bring you some feathers.

text.en: Give her 8 stripy feathers.
text.es: Dale 8 stripy feathers.

text.en: You can obtain the feathers using a bird snare to catch tropical wagtail in the Feldip Hunter area, north of the Oo'glog lodestone.
text.es: Puedes obtener las plumas usando una bird snare para atrapar tropical wagtail en la zona de Feldip Hunter, al norte de la piedra de viaje de Oo'glog.

text.en: 8 larupia furs (tatty or regular) and 4 wolf bones (if you need to trap the larupias, bring a teasing stick)
text.es: 8 larupia furs (tatty o regular) y 4 wolf bones (si necesitas atrapar a los larupias, lleva un teasing stick)

text.en: Talk to Balnea.
text.es: Habla con Balnea.

chatOptions: 1 You're going to ask me to go to the salon, right?
1 Yeah, sure, I'll go to the salon.

text.en: Talk to Kringk in the building east of the bank.
text.es: Habla con Kringk en el edificio al este del banco.

chatOptions: 2 Why, sure, I'd be happy to help.

text.en: Give her 4 wolf bones and 8 larupia furs.
text.es: Dale 4 wolf bones y 8 larupia furs.

chatOptions: 1 You sure can!

text.en: at least 6 eucalyptus logs, 2 tansymum, 1 fever grass, 1 primweed, 1 stinkbloom, and 1 lavender
text.es: al menos 6 eucalyptus logs, 2 tansymum, 1 fever grass, 1 primweed, 1 stinkbloom, y 1 lavender

text.en: 16 eucalyptus logs, 7 tansymum, 6 fever grass, 6 primweed, 6 stinkbloom, and 6 lavender (if you use BoB)
text.es: 16 eucalyptus logs, 7 tansymum, 6 fever grass, 6 primweed, 6 stinkbloom, y 6 lavender (si usas BoB)

text.en: Talk to Balnea.
text.es: Habla con Balnea.

text.en: Talk to Seegud in the building north-east of the bank.
text.es: Habla con Seegud en el edificio al noreste del banco.

text.en: Head north-east of Seegud to the thermal spring.
text.es: Dirígete al noreste de Seegud, hacia el manantial termal.

text.en: Use a pile of eucalyptus logs and a tansymum, on the fire pit nearby.
text.es: Usa un montón de eucalyptus logs y un tansymum en la hoguera cercana.

text.en: Light the fire pit. The insects won't disperse.
text.es: Enciende la hoguera. Los insectos no se dispersarán.

text.en: Talk to Seegud.
text.es: Habla con Seegud.

chatOptions: 2 I think I'm a little stuck.
1 Can you explain what I should be doing again?

text.en: Head back to the spring and talk to Snarrk.
text.es: Regresa al manantial y habla con Snarrk.

text.en: In the worst case, you need 5 piles of logs and 1 of each plant for the next step.
text.es: En el peor de los casos, necesitas 5 montones de troncos y 1 de cada planta para el siguiente paso.

text.en: Move to the thermal bath, north-east of Seegud. There is 'a pile of long brown and yellow egg-shaped stones'. This fire pit requires a pile of eucalyptus logs and one of the five plants in order to disperse the insects. By trial and error, determine which plant is needed for this pool and represents the 'yellow egg-shaped' stones. If done correctly, the swarm of insects above the pool will vanish completely.
text.es: Dirígete al baño termal, al noreste de Seegud. Hay 'a pile of long brown and yellow egg-shaped stones'. Esta hoguera requiere un montón de eucalyptus logs y una de las cinco plantas para dispersar a los insectos. Mediante prueba y error, determina qué planta es necesaria para esta poza y representa las 'yellow egg-shaped' stones. Si se hace correctamente, el enjambre de insectos sobre la poza desaparecerá por completo.

text.en: In the worst case, you need 4 piles of logs, 4 plants for yellow egg-shaped stone, and 1 of each other plant for the next step.
text.es: En el peor de los casos, necesitas 4 montones de troncos, 4 plantas para la yellow egg-shaped stone, y 1 de cada una de las demás plantas para el siguiente paso.

text.en: Move to the mud bath to the east. There is 'a pile of long brown, red sphere and yellow egg-shaped stones'. This fire pit requires eucalyptus logs and two plants. The primary plant of this pool is the same as the plant used at the thermal bath. Figure out the secondary plant by using any of the other four unused plants, until the correct combination is discovered.
text.es: Dirígete al baño de barro al este. Hay 'a pile of long brown, red sphere and yellow egg-shaped stones'. Esta hoguera requiere eucalyptus logs y dos plantas. La planta principal de esta poza es la misma que se usó en el baño termal. Averigua la planta secundaria usando cualquiera de las otras cuatro plantas no usadas, hasta descubrir la combinación correcta.

text.en: In the worst case, you need 3 piles of logs and 3 plants for red sphere stone, 1 of each other plant (except for yellow egg-shaped stone) for the next step.
text.es: En el peor de los casos, necesitas 3 montones de troncos y 3 plantas para la red sphere stone, 1 de cada una de las demás plantas (excepto la yellow egg-shaped stone) para el siguiente paso.

text.en: Move to the salt-water spring west of the thermal bath. There is 'a pile of long brown, red sphere and green gumdrop stones'. This fire pit requires eucalyptus logs and two plants. Be sure to use the secondary plant from the mud bath as the primary plant for this pool. Find the secondary plant by using the three remaining herbs until the correct one is found.
text.es: Dirígete al manantial de agua salada al oeste del baño termal. Hay 'a pile of long brown, red sphere and green gumdrop stones'. Esta hoguera requiere eucalyptus logs y dos plantas. Asegúrate de usar la planta secundaria del baño de barro como la planta principal para esta poza. Encuentra la planta secundaria usando las tres hierbas restantes hasta encontrar la correcta.

text.en: In the worst case, you need 2 piles of logs and 2 plants for green gumdrop stone, 1 of each other plant (except for yellow egg-shaped and red sphere stones) for the next step.
text.es: En el peor de los casos, necesitas 2 montones de troncos y 2 plantas para la green gumdrop stone, 1 de cada una de las demás plantas (excepto las yellow egg-shaped y red sphere stones) para el siguiente paso.

text.en: Head west to the yellow sulphur spring. There is 'a pile of long brown, purple tall and green gumdrop stones'. This fire pit requires eucalyptus logs and two plants. Use the secondary plant for the salt-water spring as the primary plant for this spring. One of the two remaining herbs will be the secondary plant, so try them both.
text.es: Dirígete al oeste, hacia el manantial de azufre amarillo. Hay 'a pile of long brown, purple tall and green gumdrop stones'. Esta hoguera requiere eucalyptus logs y dos plantas. Usa la planta secundaria del manantial de agua salada como la planta principal para este manantial. Una de las dos hierbas restantes será la planta secundaria, así que prueba ambas.

text.en: You need 1 pile of logs, 1 plant for red sphere stone, 1 plant for purple tall stone, and 1 unused plant for the next step.
text.es: Necesitas 1 montón de troncos, 1 planta para la red sphere stone, 1 planta para la purple tall stone, y 1 planta sin usar para el siguiente paso.

text.en: Head to the Bandos pool. There is 'a pile of long brown, red sphere, purple tall and orange squarish stones'. This fire pit requires eucalyptus logs and three plants. Use the secondary plant from the mud bath, the secondary plant from the sulphur pool and the unused herb.
text.es: Dirígete a la poza de Bandos. Hay 'a pile of long brown, red sphere, purple tall and orange squarish stones'. Esta hoguera requiere eucalyptus logs y tres plantas. Usa la planta secundaria del baño de barro, la planta secundaria de la poza de azufre y la hierba sin usar.

text.en: Drop all primweeds and stinkblooms to free up your backpack spaces.
text.es: Suelta todos los primweeds y stinkblooms para liberar espacio en tu mochila.

text.en: Keep all other unused plants as you will need them in the next task.
text.es: Conserva todas las demás plantas sin usar, ya que las necesitarás en la siguiente tarea.

text.en: After all of the bugs are taken care of, talk to Seegud.
text.es: Después de que todos los bichos estén controlados, habla con Seegud.

text.en: Talk to Balnea.
text.es: Habla con Balnea.

chatOptions: 1 Sure, anything to avoid talking to you for a while.

text.en: Talk to Chief Tess.
text.es: Habla con Chief Tess.

chatOptions: 1 Talk about As a First Resort quest.
1 I know how to smoke a trap to remove my scent.

text.en: 4 logs and at least 5 fever grass (8 recommended)
text.es: 4 logs y al menos 5 fever grass (se recomiendan 8)

text.en: Head to the salt-water spring.
text.es: Dirígete al manantial de agua salada.

text.en: Use the deadfall traps to catch diseased kebbits. To bait the trap, use fever grass on it, then light a fever grass from the inventory and move around.
text.es: Usa las deadfall traps para atrapar diseased kebbits. Para cebar la trampa, usa fever grass en ella, luego enciende un fever grass del inventario y muévete por la zona.

text.en: Catch two from the western and eastern side.
text.es: Atrapa dos desde el lado oeste y dos desde el lado este.

text.en: Do this until all four kebbits are caught.
text.es: Haz esto hasta que los cuatro kebbits sean atrapados.

text.en: Bird snare and a few tansymum
text.es: Bird snare y unos cuantos tansymum

text.en: Set up a bird snare west of the bank.
text.es: Coloca una bird snare al oeste del banco.

text.en: Light a tansymum from the inventory and move around.
text.es: Enciende un tansymum del inventario y muévete por la zona.

text.en: Do this until all birds are caught.
text.es: Haz esto hasta que todos los pájaros sean atrapados.

text.en: Box trap and a few lavender
text.es: Box trap y unos cuantos lavender

text.en: Head west of Chief Tess and the sulphur spring.
text.es: Dirígete al oeste de Chief Tess y del manantial de azufre.

text.en: Set up a box trap.
text.es: Coloca una box trap.

text.en: Burn lavender from the inventory and move around the area.
text.es: Quema lavender del inventario y muévete por la zona.

text.en: Once the box shakes, check the trap.
text.es: Cuando la caja se sacuda, revisa la trampa.

text.en: When all four platypodes are caught, head to the north-east corner of the village and release them next to the plants in the water.
text.es: Cuando los cuatro platypodes hayan sido atrapados, dirígete a la esquina noreste de la aldea y libéralos junto a las plantas en el agua.

text.en: Dismiss any followers before continuing.
text.es: Despide a cualquier seguidor antes de continuar.

text.en: Talk to Balnea and do not skip the cutscene.
text.es: Habla con Balnea y no te saltes la cutscene.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
